reviews.comment:
Completa y bien localizada....el baño podría mejorar pero para ser de ruta estaba muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
Complete and well located....the bathroom could be improved but for a roadside hotel it was very good.

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para reabastecerse de combustible y comer algo rápido. La última vez que estuve parecián tener problema con los desagües cloacales por el mal olor que se percibía.

(Translated by Google)
Good place to refuel and grab a quick bite to eat. Last time I was there, they seemed to have a problem with the sewage system, given the unpleasant smell.

reviews.comment:
El lugar donde sin duda se merece una parada para descansar relax disfrutar de unos buenos bocadillos asi la ruta se hace mas placentera... Asi la vuelta a casa siempre es mas tranquila ☺ buen biaje gente y que disfruten de este buen lugar de StopandGo 😎

(Translated by Google)
This is definitely the place where you deserve to stop and relax, enjoy some good snacks, making the journey more pleasant... That way, the return home is always more peaceful ☺ Have a great trip everyone, and enjoy this great StopandGo spot 😎
